name: Dairy Hollow House Almond Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt butter over low heat until golden brown. Cool.
2. In a mixing bowl, beat eggs. Add sugar, corn syrup, honey, extracts, salt, and melted butter. Stir in almonds.
3. Pour the mixture into 9-inch unbaked pastry shell.
4. Bake at 425°F for 10 minutes. Reduce heat to 325°F and bake for 35-40 minutes longer or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
5. Cool. Garnish with whipped cream, if desired.
